name: Distract
descrip: Distract an enemy with lewd teasing to get away from them. Removes all stances with target.
outcome: [AttackerName] lightly caresses and teases [TargetName]'s body, making them gasp in delight and lose focus for a moment from the sweet sensation.
miss: [AttackerName] lightly caresses and teases [TargetName]'s body to distract [TargetHimOrHer], but [TargetHeOrShe] seems completely unaffected!
statusOutcome: The distraction allows [AttackerName] to easily slip away from [TargetName]!
statusMiss: But the distraction fails, and [TargetName] stays firmly locked with [AttackerName]!
